title: WPS Preheat Temperature Calculator
description: Determines the minimum preheat temperature for welding based on material thickness, carbon equivalent, hydrogen level, and heat input, following ISO 13916 and AWS D1.1 standards.

inputs.label: Material Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the base metal to be welded, measured in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of the base metal to be welded, measured in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak yapılacak ana metalin kalınlığı, milimetre cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dicke des zu schweißenden Grundmetalls, gemessen in Millimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur du métal de base à souder, mesurée en millimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor del metal base a soldar, medido en milímetros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سمك المعدن الأساسي المراد لحامه، مقاسًا بالمليمترات.

inputs.label: Carbon Equivalent (CE)
inputs.businessContext: Carbon equivalent value calculated from material composition (IIW formula).

businessContext_i18n.en: Carbon equivalent value calculated from material composition (IIW formula).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme bileşiminden hesaplanan karbon eşdeğeri değeri (IIW formülü).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur du carbone équivalent calculée à partir de la composition du matériau (formule IIW).
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de carbono equivalente calculado a partir de la composición del material (fórmula IIW).
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة مكافئ الكربون المحسوبة من تركيب المادة (معادلة IIW).

inputs.label: Hydrogen Level (ml/100g weld metal)
inputs.businessContext: Diffusible hydrogen content of the welding consumable, per ISO 3690.

label_i18n.es: Nivel de hidrógeno (ml/100g de metal soldado)
label_i18n.ar: مستوى الهيدروجين (مل/100 جم من معدن اللحام)

businessContext_i18n.en: Diffusible hydrogen content of the welding consumable, per ISO 3690.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak sarf malzemesinin difüze olabilir hidrojen içeriği, ISO 3690'a göre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Diffusibler Wasserstoffgehalt des Schweißzusatzes nach ISO 3690.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Teneur en hydrogène diffusible du produit d'apport, selon ISO 3690.
businessContext_i18n.es: Contenido de hidrógeno difusible del consumible de soldadura, según ISO 3690.
businessContext_i18n.ar: محتوى الهيدروجين المنتشر لمستهلك اللحام، وفقًا لـ ISO 3690.

inputs.label: Heat Input (kJ/mm)
inputs.businessContext: Arc energy per unit length of weld, calculated from voltage, current, and travel speed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Arc energy per unit length of weld, calculated from voltage, current, and travel speed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Voltaj, akım ve ilerleme hızından hesaplanan birim kaynak uzunluğu başına ark enerjisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Lichtbogenenergie pro Längeneinheit der Schweißnaht, berechnet aus Spannung, Strom und Verfahrgeschwindigkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie d'arc par unité de longueur de soudure, calculée à partir de la tension, du courant et de la vitesse de déplacement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía de arco por unidad de longitud de soldadura, calculada a partir de voltaje, corriente y velocidad de avance.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طاقة القوس لكل وحدة طول من اللحام، محسوبة من الجهد والتيار وسرعة الحركة.

inputs.label: Joint Restraint Factor
inputs.businessContext: Degree of mechanical restraint on the weld joint, affecting crack susceptibility.

label_i18n.es: Factor de restricción de la junta

businessContext_i18n.en: Degree of mechanical restraint on the weld joint, affecting crack susceptibility.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak birleştirmesindeki mekanik sınırlama derecesi, çatlak duyarlılığını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Grad der mechanischen Einspannung der Schweißverbindung, beeinflusst die Rissanfälligkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Degré de contrainte mécanique sur le joint soudé, affectant la sensibilité à la fissuration.
businessContext_i18n.es: Grado de restricción mecánica en la junta soldada, que afecta la susceptibilidad a grietas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة التقييد الميكانيكي على وصلة اللحام، مما يؤثر على قابلية التشقق.

inputs.label: Preheat Method
inputs.businessContext: Method used to apply preheat, influences heating rate and uniformity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Method used to apply preheat, influences heating rate and uniformity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ön ısıtmayı uygulamak için kullanılan yöntem, ısıtma hızını ve homojenliğini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Methode zur Vorwärmung, beeinflusst Aufheizrate und Gleichmäßigkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Méthode utilisée pour appliquer le préchauffage, influence la vitesse et l'uniformité du chauffage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Método utilizado para aplicar el precalentamiento, influye en la velocidad de calentamiento y la uniformidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطريقة المستخدمة لتطبيق التسخين المسبق، تؤثر على معدل التسخين والتجانس.

rules.message: For thickness > 50 mm and CE > 0.5, preheat must be at least 150°C per ISO 13916.
High hydrogen with low heat input requires minimum preheat of 200°C.

thresholds.message: Calculated preheat is below 50°C; consider minimum 50°C for moisture removal.
Calculated preheat exceeds 300°C; verify inputs or consider alternative welding procedure.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
